title: Fine victory for Garden Route Badgers
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Six Gun Grill Garden...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers defeated the Fort Hare Academy by 239 runs in a three day match last week at NMU in George.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers defeated the Fort Hare Academy by 239 runs in a three day match last week at NMU in George."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Badgers, who batted first, posted 441 (all out) thanks to centuries by Kyle Jacobs (158) and Heath Richards (102). Fort Hare was dismissed for 232 runs in their first innings with Tyrece Karelse (3/20) and Enathi Kitshini (3/37) the pick of the bowlers.","html":"The Badgers, who batted first, posted 441 (all out) thanks to centuries by Kyle Jacobs (158) and Heath Richards (102). Fort Hare was dismissed for 232 runs in their first innings with Tyrece Karelse (3/20) and Enathi Kitshini (3/37) the pick of the bowlers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Badgers declared their second innings at 167/4 with Richards (55*) and Jacobs (43) that were again the top scorers. Stefan May posted 42. Being set a target of 377 to Fort Hare, Arend Visser excelled with 7/25 while Liviwe Bawuli (2/8) provided valuable support as the Badgers won by 239 runs.","html":"The Badgers declared their second innings at 167/4 with Richards (55*) and Jacobs (43) that were again the top scorers. Stefan May posted 42. Being set a target of 377 to Fort Hare, Arend Visser excelled with 7/25 while Liviwe Bawuli (2/8) provided valuable support as the Badgers won by 239 runs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This victory was valuable preparation for the Badgers Colts team who will take on Boland in a three- and one-day match in Paarl this weekend.","html":"This victory was valuable preparation for the Badgers Colts team who will take on Boland in a three- and one-day match in Paarl this weekend."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Badgers squad for the weekend is:","html":"The Badgers squad for the weekend is:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Matthew Christensen, Mark Andrianatos, Stefan May, Hayden Sweet (captain), Heath Richards, Liyabona Malefi, Joof Enslin, Arend Visser, Grant Esau, Mesuli Vuba, Enathi Khitshini, Thurstin Murphy and Jarred Jardine.","html":"Matthew Christensen, Mark Andrianatos, Stefan May, Hayden Sweet (captain), Heath Richards, Liyabona Malefi, Joof Enslin, Arend Visser, Grant Esau, Mesuli Vuba, Enathi Khitshini, Thurstin Murphy and Jarred Jardine."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Fine victory for Garden Route Badgers
